trophies.name: Hart Trophy
trophies.desc: The player judged to be the most valuable to his team.

trophies.name: Norris Trophy
trophies.desc: The defenseman who demonstrates the greatest all-round ability in the position.

trophies.name: Calder Trophy
trophies.desc: The player selected as the most proficient in his first year of competition in the NHL.

trophies.name: Vezina Trophy
trophies.desc: The goalkeeper adjudged to be the best at this position.

trophies.name: Selke Trophy
trophies.desc: The forward who best excels in the defensive aspects of the game.
